title: nephrolepis iridescens
intro: Nephrolepis iridescens, also known as the blue sword fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Lomariopsidaceae. This plant is native to tropical Asia and is often used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Nephrolepis iridescens include its potential to reduce stress, improve respiratory health, and alleviate symptoms of fever and cough. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by drying and powdering the leaves, and can be consumed as a tea or added to other herbal remedies.
